About.title: About WMS PROJECT
About.subtitle: Let WMS accompany you in your business
About.missionPurposeDescription: Provide technology solutions to help small, medium, and micro enterprises run business easier and more efficiently
About.missionLifeDescription: Better through the development, improvement, and popularization of technology for the benefit of the community.
About.missionStanceDescription: Customer-centric. We are committed to dedicatedly creating quality products and services.
About.missionWorkplaceDescription: A fair, efficient working environment with growth opportunities for all members.
About.visionDescription: WMS PROJECT is the platform that provides technology solutions for popular businesses in Southeast Asia
About.coreValuesCustomerDesc1: Customer-centricity, taking customers' needs and expectations as the guide for all actions.
About.coreValuesCustomerDesc2: The number of active customers and customer satisfaction are the measures of our success.
About.coreValuesQualityDescription: All of our products and services are tailored to customer needs at an affordable cost and with simplicity.
About.coreValuesTeamworkDescription: We are one to bring benefits to customers.
About.coreValuesIntegrityDesc2: Our words go hand in hand with specific actions.
About.coreValuesResponsibilityDesc1: We always consider ourselves the root of all problems.
About.coreValuesResponsibilityDesc2: We are always disciplined in our work.

Features.title: Comprehensive solution for all processes
Features.secProductBullet1Part1: Create and manage the list of
Features.secProductBullet3: Scientific product classification, easy to search and retrieve.
Features.secProductBullet4: Manage barcodes/QR codes separately for each product classification.
Features.secWarehouseBullet1Desc: Detailed division of rows, shelves, levels for easy product positioning.
Features.secWarehouseBullet2Desc: Map the placement of items, maximizing storage space.
Features.secWarehouseBullet3Desc: Support scientific arrangement of goods, avoiding confusion of picking/storing locations.
Features.secInOutSubtitle: Strictly control all movements of goods in and out of the warehouse:
Features.secInOutBullet1Desc: Easily create and approve inbound receipts from suppliers.
Features.secInOutBullet2Desc: Accurate dispatch, closely linked with order information.
Features.secInOutBullet3Desc: System automatically adds/subtracts inventory as soon as the receipt is approved.
Features.secPartnerBullet1Desc: Synchronized storage, tracking liabilities and detailed transaction history.
Features.secPartnerBullet2Desc: Visual charts of inbound/outbound/inventory quantities in real time.
Features.secStaffBullet2Part2: system: Limit features and data visibility scope by role (Warehouse keeper, Accountant, Manager...).

Hero.bullet2: Automate inbound, outbound, and inventory count processes.
Hero.experienceTitle: All warehouse information is right in your hands
Hero.processSubtitle: From the moment goods arrive at the warehouse to when they are delivered to customers
Hero.processStepInboundDesc: Create inbound receipts from suppliers quickly. Automatically accumulate quantities and update inventory values instantly.
Hero.processStepInventoryDesc: Allocate item locations intelligently. Track storage time and support periodic inventory counts without shutting down.
Hero.processStepOutboundDesc: Automatically subtract inventory upon outbound dispatch. Closely link with customer info for 100% accurate delivery coordination.
Hero.painPointsDiscrepancyDesc: Books show one thing, actual inventory shows another, causing financial losses.
Hero.painPointsSearchTimeTitle: Spending hours to search for goods
Hero.painPointsSearchTimeDesc: Cannot remember item locations, new staff spend weeks getting familiar with the warehouse.
Hero.painPointsDelayedReportsDesc: Only knowing revenue and inventory at month-end, too late to make decisions.
Hero.toolsVirtualAssistantDesc: Suggest tasks to prioritize based on real data, helping managers and warehouse staff instantly grasp the situation.
Hero.toolsBarcodeScannerDesc: Integrate barcode scanning via phone camera or handheld scanners to quickly execute inbound, outbound, and inventory tasks.
Hero.toolsStatisticsDesc: Statistical charts and report data are updated as soon as changes occur, helping to make accurate operational decisions.
Hero.businessesTitle: Thousands of businesses have chosen AUTO HOME

Pricing.title: Service pricing table
Pricing.subtitle: Suitable for all business scales
Pricing.planSupportDesc: For small business models & simple operations.
Pricing.planProfessionalDesc: For professional business models with specialized processes.
Pricing.planPremiumDesc: For large, complex business models requiring premium services.
Pricing.featurePaymentSolutions: Payment solutions: Napas VietQR/ Visa/ Master
Pricing.featureShopeeTiktok: Sell online on Shopee, TikTok Shop
Pricing.featureEcommerceSocial: Sell online on e-commerce platforms, TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, Zalo
Pricing.featureShippingCod: Integration with shipping carriers & high-speed COD

OperationsDashboard.inventoryCountAlert: You have {{count}} inventory plans to execute immediately.
OperationsDashboard.operationsCenterDesc: Manage inbound/outbound flows and track work progress.
OperationsDashboard.quickSearchDesc: Press Alt + S to quickly open the product search bar anywhere.
OperationsDashboard.fefoRuleDesc: The system automatically suggests picking from lots with the earliest expiration date to reduce waste.
OperationsDashboard.barcodeScanDesc: Use handheld scanners to quickly confirm physical quantities during inbound/outbound.

QualityControlDashboard.qcPriorityInbound: Currently, the system prioritizes QC for Inbound. Outbound QC will be updated soon.
QualityControlDashboard.failedLoadDetails: Cannot load order details for inspection.
QualityControlDashboard.qcCompleteMsg: Completed inspection for ticket {{code}}. Data has been updated to the warehouse.
QualityControlDashboard.title: Quality Control (QC)
QualityControlDashboard.description: Ensure goods inbound and outbound meet standards and correct quantity.
QualityControlDashboard.step1: Reconcile physical items with the supplier's delivery slip.
QualityControlDashboard.step2: Check packaging, labels, and product expiration dates.
QualityControlDashboard.step3: Sort intact goods from damaged/defective items.
QualityControlDashboard.step4: Confirm status on the system to complete the ticket.
QualityControlDashboard.fragileDesc: "Inspect sensitive electronic shipments carefully. Report immediately if any external box impacts are found."
